category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Jordan.

title.en: China-to-Jordan EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入约旦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入約旦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Jordan JSMO standards search and EV approval routes, EMRC electric-vehicle charging-station permits and operating licences, IEC 61851 safety and EMC expectations, IEC 62196 connector interoperability, NEPCO grid context, 50 Hz installation assumptions, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与约旦JSMO标准查询及电动车批准路径、EMRC电动汽车充电站建设许可和运营许可、IEC 61851安全及EMC预期、IEC 62196接口互操作、NEPCO电网背景、50Hz安装假设，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與約旦JSMO標準查詢及電動車批准路徑、EMRC電動汽車充電站建設許可和營運許可、IEC 61851安全及EMC預期、IEC 62196接口互操作、NEPCO電網背景、50Hz安裝假設，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, JSMO scope determination, EMRC permit or licence approval, NEPCO or distribution-company grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, operators, designers, and installers should verify current Jordan standards, EMRC licensing requirements, utility connection conditions, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、JSMO适用范围裁定、EMRC许可或执照批准、NEPCO或配电公司并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、运营商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行约旦标准、EMRC发证要求、公用事业接入条件、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、JSMO適用範圍裁定、EMRC許可或執照批准、NEPCO或配電公司併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、營運商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行約旦標準、EMRC發證要求、公用事業接入條件、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Jordan, the main confirmed gaps are Jordan-side JSMO standards and EV approval checks, EMRC construction permit and operating licence routes for public charging stations, IEC 61851 safety and EMC evidence, connector conversion from GB/T 20234 to the IEC 62196 interface expected by the target network or imported vehicles, and utility grid-connection acceptance under Jordan's 50 Hz electricity system. A blanket JSMO whole-unit mandatory EVSE certificate could not be confirmed from official public sources as of 2026-06-14, so exporters should verify the exact product scope, site licence route, and utility connection requirements before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入约旦时，主要已确认差距包括约旦侧JSMO标准及电动车批准核查、公共充电站的EMRC建设许可和运营许可路径、IEC 61851安全及EMC证据、从GB/T 20234转换到目标网络或进口车辆预期的IEC 62196接口，以及约旦50Hz电力系统下的公用事业并网验收。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方公开来源确认适用于所有EVSE整机的JSMO强制证书，因此出口商应在出货前核验准确产品范围、场站发证路径和公用事业接入要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入約旦時，主要已確認差距包括約旦側JSMO標準及電動車批准核查、公共充電站的EMRC建設許可和營運許可路徑、IEC 61851安全及EMC證據、從GB/T 20234轉換到目標網絡或進口車輛預期的IEC 62196接口，以及約旦50Hz電力系統下的公用事業併網驗收。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方公開來源確認適用於所有EVSE整機的JSMO強制證書，因此出口商應在出貨前核驗準確產品範圍、場站發證路徑和公用事業接入要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
